name: Clam Chowder, New En-Gland Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the clams, their liquid, and water; bring to a boil.
2. Drain the clams, reserving the liquid. Remove the clams from their shells and chop the meat; set aside.
3. In butter, fry the pork with onions until the onions are clear.
4. Add the potatoes and the liquid from the clams. Simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Stir in the Half & Half, seasonings (garlic, basil, parsley, and thyme), and chopped clam meat.
6. Heat through.
7. Serve hot.
